location: Awarded at the Cathedral of Manus Celes (reached via a hole beneath the Three Sisters area in Liurnia) as the final reward for completing Ranni the Witch's full questline, after giving her the Dark Moon Ring.
tactics: This requires finishing Ranni's entire questline: defeat Radahn to free the stars, retrieve the Fingerslayer Blade from Nokron, return it to Ranni, defeat Astel in Ainsel River, then find the Dark Moon Ring in a chest in the Academy of Raya Lucaria's Grand Library (post-Rennala).
Take the ring down through the hole beneath the Three Sisters/Ranni's Rise area to the Cathedral of Manus Celes and speak to Ranni to conclude the quest.
This locks in Ranni's ending for that playthrough — plan around it if you want a different ending on the same save.
The grace inside the Cathedral (where Ranni sits) is where you receive the sword after resting.
lore: Traditionally gifted by a Carian queen to her spouse, this greatsword channels the cold light of the full moon — Ranni's own sigil — letting its wielder unleash a beam of moonlight drawn from the blade itself.

builds.name: Intelligence Carian Sword-Sage
builds.why: C-rank Intelligence scaling (improving to B at +4) and an innate Moonlight Greatsword-style skill that fires a magic projectile let it serve as both melee weapon and ranged caster.

builds.name: Strength/Intelligence Quality-Caster Hybrid
builds.why: D-rank Strength and Dexterity scaling alongside its dominant Intelligence scaling supports a hybrid melee-caster build.
